title: Elixir
full_description: Head First Acrobats return with a brand-new show that blends hand-to-hand balancing, Cyr wheel, Washington trapeze and a hefty dose of clowning — all wrapped in a sci-fi comedy about super-strength, test-tube potions, and a zombie apocalypse. Three performers dressed in lab coats receive instructions from a disembodied voice-over to prepare for their role in a very strange human pharma-experiment.
ai_summary: Head First Acrobats bring their signature mix of comedy and virtuoso acrobatics to a darkly funny sci-fi premise about pharmaceutical super-powers and zombie outbreaks — hand-balancing, Cyr wheel, and circus clowning in a joyfully unhinged lab.
